basic_details.job_title: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max 28 years for BE/B.Tech/M.Sc, Max 32 years for ME/M.Tech/MS. Relaxations for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD as per Gol rules.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Junior Research Fellow is 28 years for BE/B.Tech/M.Sc. Maximum age limit for Junior Research Fellow is 32 years for ME/M.Tech/MS. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD candidates will be as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in specified disciplines with first class and GATE/NET qualification. For B.Tech/BE as qualifying degree, specific marks/CPI and GATE score are required. Age limits apply with relaxations for reserved categories.
qualification.details: Master's degree level in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Chemical Engineering / Technology, Physics, Applied Physics, Solid State Physics/Technology/Electronic Materials/Materials, Nanotechnology, Materials Science/Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, Electrical, VLSI/Microelectronics, Instrumentation Engineering Technology. First class (minimum 65% marks or 7.0 CPI) in M.Tech./ME/MS with GATE/NET qualifications and first class (minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CPI) in B.Tech./BE, 12th and 10th class. For candidates with B. Tech./BE as qualifying degree in Electrical, Electronics, Instrumentation, Nanotechnology, Materials Science/Engineering, and Engineering Physics: 75% marks or 8.0 CPI in B.Tech./BE from institutes other than IITs/IISc and 7.0 CPI in B.Tech. from IITs and IISc with valid GATE score and first class (minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CPI) in 12th and 10th class. Working/research experience in the field of design, fabrication, testing, packaging, memory devices, RRAM/Artificial Neurons, optoelectronic devices such as LED/Photodetectors, Photovoltaics, Sensors, fabrication techniques, modeling, and characterization will be given preference.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- +10% HRA/PM (first two years), Rs. 42,000/-+10% HRA/PM (third year)
salary_details.details: For the first two years: Rs. 37,000/- + 10% HRA per month. In the third year: Rs. 42,000/- + 10% HRA per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Patna Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Master's degree level in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Chemical Engineering / Technology, Physics, Applied Physics, Solid State Physics/Technology/Electronic Materials/Materials, Nanotechnology, Materials Science/Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, Electrical, VLSI/Microelectronics, Instrumentation Engineering Technology. First class (minimum 65% marks or 7.0 CPI) in M.Tech./ME/MS with GATE/NET qualifications and first class (minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CPI) in B.Tech./BE, 12th and 10th class. For candidates with B. Tech./BE as qualifying degree in Electrical, Electronics, Instrumentation, Nanotechnology, Materials Science/Engineering, and Engineering Physics: 75% marks or 8.0 CPI in B.Tech./BE from institutes other than IITs/IISc and 7.0 CPI in B.Tech. from IITs and IISc with valid GATE score and first class (minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CPI) in 12th and 10th class. Working/research experience in the field of design, fabrication, testing, packaging, memory devices, RRAM/Artificial Neurons, optoelectronic devices such as LED/Photodetectors, Photovoltaics, Sensors, fabrication techniques, modeling, and characterization will be given preference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit for Junior Research Fellow is 28 years for BE/B.Tech/M.Sc. Maximum age limit for Junior Research Fellow is 32 years for ME/M.Tech/MS. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD candidates will be as per Government of India rules.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Salary 2026
content_sections.text: For the first two years: Rs. 37,000/- + 10% HRA per month. In the third year: Rs. 42,000/- + 10% HRA per month.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 26th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: A Master's degree in specified disciplines with first class and GATE/NET qualification is required. Specific criteria apply for B.Tech/BE as the qualifying degree.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 28 years for BE/B.Tech/M.Sc and 32 years for ME/M.Tech/MS. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial application review followed by an interview. Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria to be considered.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 37,000/- +10% HRA/PM for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/-+10% HRA/PM in the third year.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for the IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is via email. Candidates need to send their application and required documents to the specified email addresses.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be attached with the email application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested scanned PDF copies of the duly filled application form, degree certificates, mark-sheets, GATE scorecard, and category certificate (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Is there any preference for candidates with prior research experience?
faq.answer: Yes, working or research experience in specific fields like design, fabrication, testing, and characterization of electronic devices will be given preference.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.
